title: brassica repanda subsp. galissieri
intro: Brassica repanda subsp. galissieri, also known as Italian rocket or rucola galissieri, is a subspecies of the Italian rocket plant, a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Brassica repanda subsp. galissieri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or used as a culinary ingredient in salads, and its leaves are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
